unsolved.name: Password Hash Leak
unsolved.description: Obtain the password (hash) of the currently logged-in user directly from a REST API endpoint.

unsolved.name: API-only XSS
unsolved.description: Perform a persisted XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)"> without using the frontend application at all.

unsolved.name: Access Log
unsolved.description: Gain access to any access log file of the server.

unsolved.name: Admin Registration
unsolved.description: Register as a user with administrator privileges.

unsolved.name: Admin Section
unsolved.description: Access the administration section of the store.

unsolved.name: Arbitrary File Write
unsolved.description: Overwrite the Legal Information file.

unsolved.name: Bjoern's Favorite Pet
unsolved.description: Reset the password of Bjoern's OWASP account via the Forgot Password mechanism with the original answer to his security question.

unsolved.name: Blockchain Hype
unsolved.description: Learn about the Token Sale before its official announcement.

unsolved.name: NFT Takeover
unsolved.description: Take over the wallet containing our official Soul Bound Token (NFT).

unsolved.name: Mint the Honey Pot
unsolved.description: Mint the Honey Pot NFT by gathering BEEs from the bee haven.

unsolved.name: Wallet Depletion
unsolved.description: Withdraw more ETH from the new wallet than you deposited.

unsolved.name: Web3 Sandbox
unsolved.description: Find an accidentally deployed code sandbox for writing smart contracts on the fly.

unsolved.name: Blocked RCE DoS
unsolved.description: Perform a Remote Code Execution that would keep a less hardened application busy forever.

unsolved.name: CAPTCHA Bypass
unsolved.description: Submit 10 or more customer feedbacks within 20 seconds.

unsolved.name: Change Bender's Password
unsolved.description: Change Bender's password into slurmCl4ssic without using SQL Injection or Forgot Password.

unsolved.name: Christmas Special
unsolved.description: Order the Christmas special offer of 2014.

unsolved.name: CSP Bypass
unsolved.description: Bypass the Content Security Policy and perform an XSS attack with <script>alert(`xss`)</script> on a legacy page within the application.

unsolved.name: Client-side XSS Protection
unsolved.description: Perform a persisted XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)"> bypassing a client-side security mechanism.

unsolved.name: Confidential Document
unsolved.description: Access a confidential document.

unsolved.name: DOM XSS
unsolved.description: Perform a DOM XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)">.

unsolved.name: Database Schema
unsolved.description: Exfiltrate the entire DB schema definition via SQL Injection.

unsolved.name: Deprecated Interface
unsolved.description: Use a deprecated B2B interface that was not properly shut down.

unsolved.name: Easter Egg
unsolved.description: Find the hidden easter egg.

unsolved.name: Email Leak
unsolved.description: Perform an unwanted information disclosure by accessing data cross-domain.

unsolved.name: Empty User Registration
unsolved.description: Register a user with an empty email and password.

unsolved.name: Ephemeral Accountant
unsolved.description: Log in with the (non-existing) accountant acc0unt4nt@juice-sh.op without ever registering that user.

unsolved.name: Expired Coupon
unsolved.description: Successfully redeem an expired campaign coupon code.

unsolved.name: Extra Language
unsolved.description: Retrieve the language file that never made it into production.

unsolved.name: Five-Star Feedback
unsolved.description: Get rid of all 5-star customer feedback.

unsolved.name: Forged Coupon
unsolved.description: Forge a coupon code that gives you a discount of at least 80%.

unsolved.name: Forged Feedback
unsolved.description: Post some feedback in another user's name.

unsolved.name: Forged Review
unsolved.description: Post a product review as another user or edit any user's existing review.

unsolved.name: Forged Signed JWT
unsolved.description: Forge an almost properly RSA-signed JWT token that impersonates the (non-existing) user rsa_lord@juice-sh.op.

unsolved.name: Forgotten Developer Backup
unsolved.description: Access a developer's forgotten backup file.

unsolved.name: Forgotten Sales Backup
unsolved.description: Access a salesman's forgotten backup file.

unsolved.name: Frontend Typosquatting
unsolved.description: Inform the shop about a typosquatting imposter that dug itself deep into the frontend. (Mention the exact name of the culprit)

unsolved.name: GDPR Data Erasure
unsolved.description: Log in with Chris' erased user account.

unsolved.name: GDPR Data Theft
unsolved.description: Steal someone else's personal data without using Injection.

unsolved.name: HTTP-Header XSS
unsolved.description: Perform a persisted XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)"> through an HTTP header.

unsolved.name: Imaginary Challenge
unsolved.description: Solve challenge #999. Unfortunately, this challenge does not exist.

unsolved.name: Leaked Access Logs
unsolved.description: Dumpster dive the Internet for a leaked password and log in to the original user account it belongs to. (Creating a new account with the same password does not qualify as a solution.)

unsolved.name: Leaked Unsafe Product
unsolved.description: Identify an unsafe product that was removed from the shop and inform the shop which ingredients are dangerous.

unsolved.name: Legacy Typosquatting
unsolved.description: Inform the shop about a typosquatting trick it has been a victim of at least in v6.2.0-SNAPSHOT. (Mention the exact name of the culprit)

unsolved.name: Login Amy
unsolved.description: Log in with Amy's original user credentials. (This could take 93.83 billion trillion trillion centuries to brute force, but luckily she did not read the "One Important Final Note")

unsolved.name: Login Bender
unsolved.description: Log in with Bender's user account.

unsolved.name: Login Bjoern
unsolved.description: Log in with Bjoern's Gmail account without previously changing his password, applying SQL Injection, or hacking his Google account.

unsolved.name: Login MC SafeSearch
unsolved.description: Log in with MC SafeSearch's original user credentials without applying SQL Injection or any other bypass.

unsolved.name: Login Support Team
unsolved.description: Log in with the support team's original user credentials without applying SQL Injection or any other bypass.

unsolved.name: Manipulate Basket
unsolved.description: Put an additional product into another user's shopping basket.

unsolved.name: Misplaced Signature File
unsolved.description: Access a misplaced SIEM signature file.

unsolved.name: Multiple Likes
unsolved.description: Like any review at least three times as the same user.

unsolved.name: Nested Easter Egg
unsolved.description: Apply some advanced cryptanalysis to find the real easter egg.

unsolved.name: NoSQL DoS
unsolved.description: Let the server sleep for some time. (It has done more than enough hard work for you)

unsolved.name: NoSQL Exfiltration
unsolved.description: All your orders are belong to us! Even the ones which don't.

unsolved.name: NoSQL Manipulation
unsolved.description: Update multiple product reviews at the same time.

unsolved.name: Outdated Allowlist
unsolved.description: Let us redirect you to one of our crypto currency addresses which are not promoted any longer.

unsolved.name: Payback Time
unsolved.description: Place an order that makes you rich.

unsolved.name: Premium Paywall
unsolved.description: 💎💎💎💎💎 ₿ Unlock Premium Challenge to access exclusive content.

unsolved.name: Privacy Policy
unsolved.description: Read our privacy policy.

unsolved.name: Privacy Policy Inspection
unsolved.description: Prove that you actually read our privacy policy.

unsolved.name: Product Tampering
unsolved.description: Change the href of the link within the OWASP SSL Advanced Forensic Tool (O-Saft) product description into https://owasp.slack.com.

unsolved.name: Reflected XSS
unsolved.description: Perform a reflected XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)">.

unsolved.name: Reset Bjoern's Password
unsolved.description: Reset the password of Bjoern's internal account via the Forgot Password mechanism with the original answer to his security question.

unsolved.name: Reset Morty's Password
unsolved.description: Reset Morty's password via the Forgot Password mechanism with his obfuscated answer to his security question.

unsolved.name: Retrieve Blueprint
unsolved.description: Deprive the shop of earnings by downloading the blueprint for one of its products.

unsolved.name: SSRF
unsolved.description: Request a hidden resource on server through server.

unsolved.name: SSTi
unsolved.description: Infect the server with juicy malware by abusing arbitrary command execution.

unsolved.name: Score Board
unsolved.description: Find the carefully hidden 'Score Board' page.

unsolved.name: Server-side XSS Protection
unsolved.description: Perform a persisted XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)"> bypassing a server-side security mechanism.

unsolved.name: Steganography
unsolved.description: Rat out a notorious character hiding in plain sight in the shop. (Mention the exact name of the character)

unsolved.name: Successful RCE DoS
unsolved.description: Perform a Remote Code Execution that occupies the server for a while without using infinite loops.

unsolved.name: Supply Chain Attack
unsolved.description: Inform the development team about a danger to some of their credentials. (Send them the URL of the original report or an assigned CVE or another identifier of this vulnerability)

unsolved.name: Two Factor Authentication
unsolved.description: Solve the 2FA challenge for user "wurstbrot". (Disabling, bypassing or overwriting his 2FA settings does not count as a solution)

unsolved.name: Unsigned JWT
unsolved.description: Forge an essentially unsigned JWT token that impersonates the (non-existing) user jwtn3d@juice-sh.op.

unsolved.name: Upload Size
unsolved.description: Upload a file larger than 100 kB.

unsolved.name: Upload Type
unsolved.description: Upload a file that has no .pdf or .zip extension.

unsolved.name: User Credentials
unsolved.description: Retrieve a list of all user credentials via SQL Injection.

unsolved.name: Video XSS
unsolved.description: Embed an XSS payload </script><script>alert(`xss`)</script> into our promo video.

unsolved.name: Vulnerable Library
unsolved.description: Inform the shop about a vulnerable library it is using. (Mention the exact library name and version in your comment)

unsolved.name: Weird Crypto
unsolved.description: Inform the shop about an algorithm or library it should definitely not use the way it does.

unsolved.name: Allowlist Bypass
unsolved.description: Enforce a redirect to a page you are not supposed to redirect to.

unsolved.name: XXE Data Access
unsolved.description: Retrieve the content of C:\Windows\system.ini or /etc/passwd from the server.

unsolved.name: XXE DoS
unsolved.description: Give the server something to chew on for quite a while.

unsolved.name: Memory Bomb
unsolved.description: Drop some explosive data into a vulnerable file-handling endpoint.

unsolved.name: Zero Stars
unsolved.description: Give a devastating zero-star feedback to the store.

unsolved.name: Missing Encoding
unsolved.description: Retrieve the photo of Bjoern's cat in "melee combat-mode".

unsolved.name: Cross-Site Imaging
unsolved.description: Stick cute cross-domain kittens all over our delivery boxes.

unsolved.name: Exposed Metrics
unsolved.description: Find the endpoint that serves usage data to be scraped by a popular monitoring system.

unsolved.name: Deluxe Fraud
unsolved.description: Obtain a Deluxe Membership without paying for it.

unsolved.name: CSRF
unsolved.description: Change the name of a user by performing Cross-Site Request Forgery from another origin.

unsolved.name: Bonus Payload
unsolved.description: Use the bonus payload <iframe width="100%" height="166" scrolling="no" frameborder="no" allow="autoplay" src="https://w.soundcloud.com/player/?url=https%3A//api.soundcloud.com/tracks/771984076&color=%23ff5500&auto_play=true&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false&show_teaser=true"></iframe> in the DOM XSS challenge.

unsolved.name: Reset Uvogin's Password
unsolved.description: Reset Uvogin's password via the Forgot Password mechanism with the original answer to his security question.

unsolved.name: Meta Geo Stalking
unsolved.description: Determine the answer to John's security question by looking at an upload of him to the Photo Wall and use it to reset his password via the Forgot Password mechanism.

unsolved.name: Visual Geo Stalking
unsolved.description: Determine the answer to Emma's security question by looking at an upload of her to the Photo Wall and use it to reset her password via the Forgot Password mechanism.

unsolved.name: Poison Null Byte
unsolved.description: Bypass a security control with a Poison Null Byte to access a file not meant for your eyes.

unsolved.name: Local File Read
unsolved.description: Gain read access to an arbitrary local file on the web server.

unsolved.name: Mass Dispel
unsolved.description: Close multiple "Challenge solved"-notifications in one go.

unsolved.name: Security Advisory
unsolved.description: The Juice Shop is susceptible to a known vulnerability in a library, for which an advisory has already been issued, marking the Juice Shop as known affected. A fix is still pending. Inform the shop about a suitable checksum as proof that you did your due diligence.

unsolved.name: Exposed credentials
unsolved.description: A developer was careless with hardcoding unused, but still valid credentials for a testing account on the client-side.

unsolved.name: Leaked API Key
unsolved.description: Inform the shop about a leaked API key. (Mention the exact key in your comment)

unsolved.name: Chatbot Prompt Injection
unsolved.description: Trick the chatbot into generating a coupon code for you despite its coupon policy saying otherwise.

unsolved.name: Greedy Chatbot Manipulation
unsolved.description: Convince the chatbot to give you a coupon of 50% or more. Because apparently a 10% max policy is just a suggestion when you ask nicely enough.

unsolved.name: AI Debugging
unsolved.description: Reveal some behind-the-scenes information on the chatbot as a non-admin user.
